questions.question: What is the time complexity of the brute force approach for solving the Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP), which involves checking all possible routes for visiting each city exactly once and returning to the origin city?
questions.hint: Note: TSP has a large number of possible solutions

questions.question: Consider a city with 5 cities. Using a brute force approach, how many possible routes would be generated to find the shortest route for visiting each city exactly once and returning to the origin city?
questions.hint: Use the concept of permutations to solve this

questions.question: What is the main disadvantage of using a brute force approach for solving the Travelling Salesman Problem (TSP), and how can it be addressed?
questions.hint: Note: Consider the trade-off between time and memory
